chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.526 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case. 12.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- None appeared on behalf of the applicant on last date. No intimation was received. Same is the case today. None appeared for the applicant. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
